title: Re:Deco
body:
Re:Deco

A Simple, Vanilla inspired furniture mod. none of the furniture mods I've seen recently have scratched the itch so... I made my own! this is my first mod, so, I hope I did good! I'm only supporting 1 version at a time, so my update strategy is this: I'll pick a primary mc version, then on updates to the primary version i'll hit all the versions between. for example, if u look at the downloads you'll see when i updated from 1.19.2 to 1.20/1, I exported for all versions between. My current primary version is 1.20/1. most likely 1.21 will be my next primary version, and i'll export for 1.20.4 on the when i update. Currently Adds: - Tables - Chairs, Stools and Benches - Coffee Tables - Drawers - Side Tables - Shelves - Lattices - Plank Fences/Gates - Terrariums - Sofas - Ottomans - Pet Beds - Fluffy Carpet - Light Bulbs - Lamps - Paper Lanterns - Stone Lanterns - Cabinets - Counters - Counter Cabinets - Counter Drawers - Pedestals - Display Cases - Sword Mounts - Spyglass Stands - Paper Panes, Doors and Trapdoors If you have any ideas or feedback, or want to show me what you've made, my discord and twitter (rip) are @OopsOnlyDelta!
